query:
SELECT c.id, c.code, c.title, COUNT(l.id) as lesson_count 
FROM courses c 
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId 
WHERE c.code LIKE 'WOR%' 
GROUP BY c.id;
command:
